profile.name: Ali Bayramli
profile.title: Platform Engineer
profile.headline: Platform engineer who reduces delivery friction with internal tooling, automation, and full-stack systems.
profile.summary: 8+ years across fintech and enterprise. I build developer portals, CI/CD workflows, cloud-backed applications, and observability foundations that help teams ship faster and operate with less drag.
profile.resumeSummary: Platform engineer and full-stack developer with 8+ years across fintech and enterprise. Builds developer portals, delivery automation, and internal applications with React, Angular, Node.js, and Python. Specializes in Backstage plugins, release workflows, and internal tooling that reduce manual review.
profile.availability: Open to remote senior platform and full-stack roles
profile.contactHeadline: Available for platform engineering, full-stack delivery, and consulting engagements.
resumeSkillLines: Backstage.io, Developer Portals, React, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, Python
CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions
PostgreSQL, REST APIs, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, Azure AI Services

about.title: I build internal tools that help teams ship faster.
paragraphs: I work across platform and product. I build developer portals, release workflows, and the app features around them.
Most of my work is about removing manual steps, making services easier to find, and shipping reliable frontend and backend code.

cards.title: Platforms people actually use
cards.description: I make internal tools clear enough that teams actually use them.
points: UI built for clarity and adoption

cards.title: Platform and product
cards.description: I can work on the portal, app code, and API layer without long handoffs.

cards.title: Reliable delivery
cards.description: I build delivery paths that are easier to ship, monitor, and maintain.

experiences.description: Developer platform initiatives and application delivery for a global forex broker.
experiences.impact: ~40% less manual review in catalog validation
experiences.resumeLine: Built Backstage.io validation workflows with Azure AI, reducing manual catalog review for internal services.
resumeBullets: Built Backstage.io plugins and Azure AI-assisted catalog validation workflows, reducing manual review by about 40% and improving internal service governance.
Delivered internal tooling across React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, and supported Trading.com's multi-region Angular launch with i18n and state management.
achievements: Built Backstage.io plugin workflows with Azure AI-assisted entity validation to reduce manual catalog review and governance load.
Delivered full-stack internal tooling across React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and service integration layers.
Supported Trading.com launch work with Angular architecture, i18n, and state management for multi-region rollout.

experiences.description: Modernized legacy financial applications for enterprise-scale teams.
experiences.resumeLine: Modernized broker-facing Angular applications used by 15,000+ users, improving clarity and daily productivity.
resumeBullets: Modernized broker-facing Angular applications used by 15,000+ users, improving workflow clarity and daily productivity for trading teams through responsive, data-heavy interfaces.
achievements: Rebuilt desktop-era workflows as modern Angular web applications for broker-facing teams.
Refined interfaces used by 15,000+ users, improving clarity and day-to-day productivity.
Implemented responsive data grids and real-time trading experiences for faster interaction.

experiences.description: Built and optimized an email marketing dashboard with measurable performance gains.
experiences.resumeLine: Improved template and campaign flows, cutting generation time by 40 percent and speeding delivery.
resumeBullets: Improved campaign and template workflows, cutting generation time by 40% and speeding delivery across Vue.js, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS S3.
achievements: Improved dashboard UX for template styling and campaign operations.
Reduced generation time by 40%, speeding up campaign delivery and editing loops.
Integrated AWS S3 storage flows for more reliable asset management.

experiences.description: Developed internal UI kits and a website builder for enterprise teams.
experiences.resumeLine: Built reusable UI kits for an internal website builder, helping reduce delivery time by 25 percent and project cost by 15 percent.
resumeBullets: Built reusable UI kits and internal website-builder components, reducing delivery time by 25% and project cost by 15% while integrating SharePoint APIs for enterprise content operations.
achievements: Built reusable UI kits with AngularJS and jQuery to standardize internal website creation.
Contributed to a 15% reduction in project cost and a 25% decrease in delivery time.
Integrated SharePoint APIs for smoother content operations.

projects.title: Platform DevOps Lab
projects.label: Open-source platform lab
projects.description: A production-shaped learning repo for full-stack delivery, observability, local tooling, and Kubernetes starter workflows.
projects.result: Built to practice platform delivery end to end, not just isolated app development.
projects.resumeLine: Production-shaped platform lab covering observability, local tooling, and Kubernetes starter workflows.
caseStudy: Built a TypeScript full-stack app with modular Express services, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, and a React frontend organized by feature domains.
Added end-to-end observability with Prometheus metrics, OpenTelemetry tracing, Tempo, Grafana dashboards, and structured JSON logs.
Created Docker Compose workflows, Makefile shortcuts, CI quality checks, and Kubernetes starter manifests for hands-on platform practice.

projects.title: Backstage.io IDP Integration
projects.label: Developer portal project
projects.description: Custom Backstage.io plugin development with Azure AI integration for automated catalog validation and better internal service discoverability.
projects.result: Reduced manual review with AI-assisted catalog governance for internal services.
projects.resumeLine: Backstage.io portal work with Azure AI-assisted validation for stronger catalog governance and discoverability.
caseStudy: Delivered custom Backstage plugins for service catalog governance.
Automated entity validations to reduce manual review load.
Improved developer portal discoverability for internal services.

projects.title: FX Notifier
projects.label: Automation tool project
projects.description: A Python automation tool that fetches FX rates from the Frankfurter API and posts weekday Telegram updates, including derived EUR/AZN rates.
projects.result: Automated the full weekday FX update flow from data retrieval to delivery.
projects.resumeLine: Python automation for weekday Telegram FX updates, including derived rates and scheduled delivery.
caseStudy: Built an FX service layer with config validation and retry and backoff for network resilience.
Implemented deterministic AZN derivation via EUR to USD and a configurable USD to AZN peg.
Automated weekday notifications using scheduled GitHub Actions with secret-based Telegram delivery.

projects.title: Trading.com Platform
projects.label: Product launch project
projects.description: Front-end architecture and development for a broker launch into European and Australian markets.
projects.result: Supported multi-region rollout with lower frontend latency.
projects.resumeLine: Multi-region Angular launch work with state management and i18n support for market expansion.
caseStudy: Led UI architecture for a multi-region rollout.
Implemented state management patterns for high-frequency updates.
Delivered i18n-ready UX for rapid market expansion.
